summary:
Analytical and proactive Project Manager with twelve years
of experience managing software application development &
digitalisation projects, with budgets ranging from $10k to $700k.

experience.description: York Swift Software is an American multinational publishing, education and media company known for publishing, selling, and distributing books and educational materials for schools, teachers, parents, and children. As an IT Project Manager, my core activities include:
achievements: Collaborating with internal and external stakeholders to gather project requirements
Working with the Project Management Of'ce to determine the projectEs human capital needs
Jstimating project budgets and writing all necessary documentation for approval
Overall project governance, including ensuring compliance to industry and government regulations
The lead of the development of a foundational framework based on Hava, HSP, Struts, CSS, QTML, HavaScript, Oracle, and MS SVL Server
Provide mentoring services to junior developers and engineers when needed.

experience.description: York Han 2015 — Han 2019 Xiacom is an American multinational media conglomerate with interests primarily in cinema and cable television. As an Project Manager, my core activities included:
achievements: Spearheading software development projects, with a primary emphasis on Agile development
Tracking project timelines, deliverables, and budgets
Assessing project risks and proactively resolving issues
Facilitating morning stand-up meetings with the project scrum team
Wrote Python scripts to load data and parse DML documents
Showcasing progress to state management in biweekly meetings,

experience.description: York Oct 2012 — Han 2015 The National Basketball Association is a menEs professional basketball league in North America. As a Hr Project Manager, I assisted the project management team with a wide range of software development and infrastructure projects in the ticketeing and online departments.
